source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

Teemad on olnud
- erinevad tootejuhid ja põhioskused nõuete väljatöötamisel
- kuidas tootejuhid tagavad insenerimeeskonna pideva rütmi
- tootejuhtidega, kellel on erinev taust (inseneeria, andmeanalüütik, operaatiivne ekspert, konsultatsioon jne) tegelemine
- lõbus on see, et see direktor ja mina töötasime varasemas ettevõttes koos tootejuhtidega, keda ma ei juhtinud, ja ma saan viidata "kuule, kas mäletad seda inimest? see inimene oli fantastiline ja siin on miks."

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

Just saw a really nice #unistus, kus ma sain sõbraks Lee Chaeyeoniga. Just hakkasin temaga rääkima ja järgmine asi, mida ma tean, on see, et olen tema juurde ööbima jäänud (nagu siis, kui prantslased mu jõulude ajal röövisid) ja ta ütleb mulle, et mine üles ja "korista natuke" (tema inglise keel oli üldiselt suurepärane), millega ta pidas silmas "korista natuke", et näidata oma emale, et oleme söömiseks valmis.
Ta tuleb üles, et oma tuba "koristada" ja hakkab žeste tegema, et seletada, mida ta silmas peab...
1/

(ta oli alati nii Elevil, et mind selles unenäos näha) sest ma võtsin oma jope seljast, selle asemel et "korista natuke."
Siis näitab ta seda väikest paberit ja ütleb, et on mulle autogrammi jätnud, aga vastutasuks tahab seda väikest kauband Cardi, mille ma teises klassis tegin "50 Spikes," sonic knock-off, muidugi rohkem okastega. (See kaart eksisteerib tegelikult IRL muide). Hakkan talle selgitama, mis see on ja kas ta tõesti tahab seda (ta tahtis) ja vähemalt vajan ma pilti, kus ta seda hoiab.
2/

Osaliselt sellepärast, et ma igatsesin seda, aga ka seetõttu, et muidu ei usuks keegi, et ta tahtis seda asja minult.
Siis sain aru, et meil pole ikka veel teineteise telefoninumbrit.
3/3

Ta tuli üles "koristama" oma tuba ja hakkas žeste tegema, et selgitada, mida ta silmas peab...
1/

(ta oli alati nii elevil, et mind näha) sest ma võtsin oma jope seljast, selle asemel et "koristama."
Siis näitab ta mulle ühte väikest paberit ja ütleb, et on jätnud mulle autogrammi, aga vastutasuks tahab ta seda väikeses kauband Kaarti, mille ma teises klassis tegin nimega "50 Spikes", sonic knock-off, loomulikult rohkem okastega. (See kaart eksisteerib tegelikult IRL muide). Hakkan talle seletama, mis see on ja kui ta tõeliselt tahab seda (ta tahtis) siis vähemalt oleks mul vaja pilti, kus ta seda hoiab.
2/

Osaliselt seetõttu, et ma igatsen seda, aga ka selle pärast, et muidu ei usuks keegi, et ta tõesti tahtis seda asja minult.
Siis taipasin, et meil ei olnud ikka veel teineteise telefoninumbreid.
3/3

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

Jade, if you want to get back together with Beck, then why don't you just tell him?
I did, but he rejected me.
Um, not to be mean, but why are you coming to me for help?
Because I don't want anyone who's cool to see me like this.
Okay, maybe you should wait.
Are we.
We're not even friends.
Well, yeah, but if you help me.
Maybe I'll like you.
So if I help you, I get a mean friend and a broken kite.
Please, just please talk to Beck for me.

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

hypo_0:
Tere hommikust maailmad!
Me käime täna hommikul tipust läbi. See aitab meil selgeks saada mõned asjad, mille eile sõidust sorteerisime. Ma ei arva, et me saame kõik ära koristada, kui me ei too haagist, aga haagis on täis terast, mida tuleb kaaluda.
Hiljem võib-olla jätkan kandekastide pakkimist.
#TereHommikustMaailmad

Tipu reis tehtud ja teine autoäit tühjendatud.
Olen võtnud uue haagise telje ja haagise mootori süsteemi välja romusoodist. See tähendab, et saame rohkem romu sinna tuua ja samas mitte kogemata kaaluda osi, mida soovin hoida.
Mõtle, et järgmine samm on kolida romuterased tagahoovist haagisesse, et see oleks valmis minema.
Romuteralde hinnad ei ole hetkel väga kõrged, aga parem kui mitte midagi, kui ma võtan piisavalt korraga.
Peab veel sorteerima mitteferroset romu.

See hetk, kui võtad rooste läinud rehvid väikeste, laiate murutraktori ratastelt ära....
Hästi suur vaev oli rehvi ühe külje eemaldamine, aga see oli teisel pool servast väga halva roostega kinni.
Samas ajas, mil mulle õnnestus bead lahti murda, olin unustanud, et olin juba teise külje valmis teinud, ja lõpetasin sellega, et serv oli vaba, aga täiesti rehvi sees!
Pidin selle külje rehvi uuesti peale panema ja siis seal ümber töötama, et serv välja saada.
Pidin ka sisetoru lõikama, et see välja saada!
Küsin endalt, kui palju rehve ma veel pean eemaldama? Seni on neli tehtud.

Hiljem võin jätkata kandekastide pakkimisega.
#TereHommikustMaailmad

Tipu reis on tehtud ja teine autoäit tühjendatud.
Olen võtnud uue haagise telje ja mootori romuhaagise koormast välja. See tähendab, et saame sinna rohkem romu sisse laadida ja samas mitte kogemata kaaluda osi, mida tahan hoida.
Mõtle, et järgmine asi, mida hakkan tegema, on romuterase liigutamine tagahoovist haagisesse, et see oleks teele minekuks valmis.
Romuteralde hinnad ei ole praegu väga kõrged, aga parem kui mitte midagi, kui ma võtan korraga piisavalt.
Tuleb veel sorteerida mitteferroset romu.

See hetk, kui võtad rooste läinud rehvid väikeste, laiate murutraktori ratastelt ära....
Oli tohutu vaev rehvi ühe külje eemaldamine, aga see oli teisel pool servast uskumatult roostene ja kinni.
Samas ajas, mil mul õnnestus bead lahti murda, olin unustanud, et olin juba teise külje valmis teinud, ja lõpuks oli serv vaba, aga täiesti rehvi sees!
Pidin selle külje rehvi uuesti peale panema ja siis selle ümber tegema, et serv välja saada.
Pidin ka sisetoru lõikama, et see välja saada!
Küsin endalt, kui palju rehve ma veel pean eemaldama? Seni on neli tehtud.

Hiljem võin jätkata kandekastide pakkimist.

Arvan, et järgmine asi, mida hakkan tegema, on romuterase liigutamine tagahoovist haagisesse, et see valmis saada.

Kõigepealt tuleb aga sorteerida mitteferroset romu.

Ühe külje rehvi eemaldamine on tohutu vaev, aga see oli teisel pool rimist tõeliselt roostes ja kinni.
Kui mul õnnestus bead lahti murda, olin juba unustanud, et olin teise külje valmis teinud, ja lõpuks oli serv vaba, aga täiesti rehvi sees!
Pidin selle külje rehvi uuesti peale panema ja siis selle ümber töö tegema, et serv välja saada.

Hiljem võin jätkata kandekastide pakkimist.
#TereHommikustMaailmad

Prügi reis on tehtud ja veel üks autoäit on tühjendatud.
Olen uue haagise telje ja mootori scrap metal koormast välja võtnud. See tähendab, et saame sinna rohkem romuterasid sisse laadida ja samas mitte kogemata kaaluda osi, mida tahaksin hoida.
Arvan, et järgmine samm on liigutada romuterased tagahoovist haagisesse, et see valmis oleks.
Romuteralde hinnad ei ole hetkel kõrged, aga parem midagi, kui ma piisavalt korraga võtan.
Kõigepealt tuleb veel sorteerida mitteferroset romu.

See hetk, kui võtad roostes rehvid väikestelt, laiatelt murutraktori ratastelt ära....
Ühe külje rehvi eemaldamine on tohutu vaev, kuid teine külg rimist on tõeliselt roostes ja kinni.
Kui tuvastasin, et bead lahti murda, olin unustanud, et olin teise külje juba valmis teinud, ja lõpptulemusena oli serv vaba, kuid täiesti rehvi sees!
Pidin selle külje rehvi uuesti peale panema ja siis ümber selle töötama, et serv välja saada.
Pidin ka sisetoru lõikama, et see välja saada!
Küsin endalt, kui palju veel rehve ma pean eemaldama? Seni neli tehtud.

@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.

But if you don't say it, and if you stand firm in what you believe in your faith, you're going to lose it all.
And I just remember starting off and, oh, it was like it was just yesterday.
And I remember saying, you know, it's great that Americans, you know, you can choose one or the other.
And it was like the Lord just smacked me right in the face and was like, who are you and what do you believe?
You know what you believe.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

Aga väljas oli natuke liiga valjusti, et liiklusest üle rääkida, kuigi väljas on tõeliselt mõnus.  
Näitan sulle menüüd.  
Siin on menüü.  
Mis siin üleval kirjas on?  
Bloody Mary brunch punch.

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

hypo_0:
Lugedes Gloria Steinem'i salajast raportit Playboy Bunni elust... lõpetasin I osa ja kurat🤔
Kuigi olin hästi teadlik, et Playboy on noh... KORPORATSIOON haha... ei olnud mul aimugi, kui palju nende kogu infrastruktuur tõeliselt aitas klassismi igati tõeliselt vastikult ellu viia, samu näidates ennast "klassi" ning seega "eetilisema" valikuna võrreldes näiteks Hustleriga

Postitan mõningad ekraanipildid hiljem, aga et anda sulle aimu, Bunnid (kes olid kokteiliteenindajad) pidid:
- nõustuma madalama (200-150 dollarit, mis on tänapäeva 2.5K dollariga ekvivalentne) palgaga, kui reklaamitud
- andma 50% oma jootrahadest üle
- andma oma perekonnanime "Number 1 võtmehoidjatele" (seega, kuulsustele/elitaarsetele) kui küsiti
- olema täielikult allutatud vaagna eksamitele ja vereanalüüsidele, aga ei tohtinud valida arstiga
- olema jälgitud erainimese poolt
- olema valmis varjama oma mehi/poiss-sõpru

Kõike seda ühendav keskne punkt:
Bunnidel ei olnud ÜLDSE lubatud (karistuseks vallandamine) flirdida teiste töötajate või klientidega... KUID "Number 1 võtmehoidjatega" kohtingutele minek oli lubatud, kui mitte lausa julgustatud. Näed, kuhu see viib?

Uutele värvatutele anti "Bunny Piibel", et õppida kõiki neid kummalisi reegleid ja juhiseid.
Lisaks veel mõned:
- Bunnide töötulemus hinnati "punktisüsteemi" (JAH, just see sõnastus!) järgi, mitte ei kirjutatud üles. Üllatus-üllatus, teenet mõõdeti mitte ainult hea tööeetika järgi, vaid ka väga spetsiifiliste nõudmiste järgi välimuse ja suhtumise osas.
- oli olemas motivatsioonisüsteem, mis premeeris Bunnisid, kes müüsid kõige rohkem alkoholi ja kaubamärke

source_doc:
Oh.
Over here.
I was like, I swear I saw better ones online.
Oh, this is the one I looked at.
It's like a blue tie dye color where I could go with this purple one.
What one were you thinking?
That's a kit.
Has a strap in it.
Um.
Oh, and a block.
I saw people with these blocks in the class yesterday.
Because when you're doing like certain stretches and you can't reach the ground, it like really helps.
Wait, I don't like the way this feels.
It doesn't feel like it's going to grip.

Kuna kui sa teed teatud venitusi ja sa ei ulatu maani, aitab see tõeliselt.  
Oota, mulle ei meeldi see tunne.  
See ei tundu nagu kinni jääks.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle
instruction: You are a professional Estonian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Estonian (ekk_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Estonian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Estonian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Estonian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Estonian (ekk_Latn):
hypo_0:
@la Ei ole masinatöötluses reegel #1, et kui sa pole seda tasandatud, siis see ei ole sirge ega tasane?

@azonenberg jah, muidugi, aga ma *tõepoolest* tahtsin seda tasandada. Lihtsalt mu tööriista nulli seadistus oli vale.
Sest ma arvasin, et see on enam-vähem tasane.
Täna teen ma lisatükki. Mul on materjali. Ja kui mul pole, siis see أعكر ،et lõpuks mind piinab. Pluss, erinevate proovide sobitamisel murdsin ma liimi, mis hoidis osa mu plaadi peal, nii et ma peaksin selle nagunii uuesti paika seadma, mida ma ei taha teeeeha, nii et.....

@la Ma tean seda tunnet.
Mul oli sarnane probleem, kui töötasin oma majaga, kus sõna otseses mõttes kõik andmed, mida võis arvata, olid valed.
Mul oli tööline, kes raamistas ukseava püstiselt ja sirgena. Pidin pärast tema lahkumist paar tüüblit välja rebima, sest uks pidi olema tasemest nagu üks kraad kõver, et olla põranda tasemel ja mitte õhus ühelt küljelt.
Teisel (osaliselt kõrgusel) seinapäeval on iga tüübel hoolikalt lõigatud pikkusesse, sest kaks pole sama suurusega... Põrand ei ole tasane, nii et kui tahad, et tööpind oleks tasane, peab sein olema paralleelogramm, mitte ristkülik.
hypo_1:
@la Ei ole masinatöötluses reegel #1, et kui sa pole seda õigesti tasandanud, siis see ei ole sirge ega tasane?

@azonenberg jah, muidugi, aga ma *tõepoolest* tahtsin seda tasandada. Lihtsalt mu tööriista nulli seadistus oli vale.
Sest ma arvasin, et see on enam-vähem tasane.
Täna teen ma lisatükki. Mul on materjali. Ja kui mul seda ei ole, siis see hakkab mind lõputult häirima. Pluss, proovides haavandit paika saada, murdsin ma liimi, mis hoidis osa mu plaadi peal, nii et pean nagunii selle uuesti kohale seadma, mida ma just ei taha tehaaaaa, nii et.....

@la Ma tean seda tunnet.
Mul oli sarnane probleem, kui töötasin oma majaga, kus sõna otseses mõttes kõik andmed, mida oleks võinud kasutada, olid valed.
Mul oli tööline, kes raamistas ukseava püstiselt ja sirgena. Pidin pärast tema lahkumist paar postitust välja tõmbama, sest uks pidi olema tasemest umbes ühe kraadi võrra kõver, et olla põranda tasemel ja mitte õhus ühel küljel.
Teisel (osaliselt kõrgusel) seinapäeval on iga tüübel hoolikalt lõigatud, kuna kaks pole kunagi sama suurusega... Põrand ei ole tasane, nii et kui tahad, et tööpind oleks tasemel, peab sein olema paralleelogramm, mitte ristkülik.
hypo_2:
@la Ei ole masinatöötlemise reegel #1, et kui sa pole seda korralikult tasaselt teinud, ei ole see sirge ega tasane?

@azonenberg jah, muidugi, aga ma *tõepoolest* tahtsin selle tasandada. Lihtsalt mu tööriista nullseadistus oli vale.
Sest ma eeldasin, et see on enam-vähem tasane.
Täna teen ma lisatükki. Mul on materjal olemas. Ja kui mul seda ei ole, siis see häirib mind igavesti. Pluss, proovides laagrit kohale seadistada, murdsin ma liimi, mis hoidis tükki mu plaadi peal, nii et pean nagunii selle uuesti paika seadma, mida ma ei taha tehaaaaaa, nii et.....

@la Ma tean seda tunnet.
Mul oli sarnane probleem, kui töötasin oma majaga, kus tõeliselt kõik andmed, mida oleks võinud kasutada, olid valed.
Mul oli tööline, kes raamistas ukseava püstiselt ja sirgena. Pidin pärast tema lahkumist paar posti välja tõmbama, kuna uks pidi olema tasemest umbes ühe kraadi nurga all, et olla põranda tasemega ja mitte õhus ühel küljel.
Teisel (osaliselt kõrgusel) seinapäeval on igal tüüblil hoolikalt mõõdetud pikkus, kuna ükski ei ole sama suurusega... Põrand ei ole tasane, seega et tööpind oleks tasemel, peab sein olema paralleelogramm, mitte ristkülik.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

These beautiful things that I've got.
And then Benson, that front flip.
What were you thinking?
I was not thinking.
You had started doing flips when I was a little a little boy, and I thought he was the coolest.
So when I was like three, I would try them off my couch and it progressed and progressed to the front yard and then on stage.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.

hypo_0:
Natuke kergemal noodil, just nägin kedagi kurtmas selle üle, et mängud paluvad sul minna lihtsasse režiimi, kui sa läbi kukud.
Mulle ka see ei meeldi.
Mulle meeldib, et oleks lihtne režiim. Kurat, ma arvan, et mängud peaksid tõeliselt lubama sul petta, kui kõik konkurendid on selle kohta kokku leppinud reeglid.
Aga iga mäng, mis on mind sundinud lihtsasse režiimi minema, on olnud koheviha. Mul on palju mänge, mida mängida, kui sa tahad, et ma kiiremini lõpetaksin, siis palun, olen kiiremini lõpetanud.

Just see muudab modernsed Mario - vähemalt modernsed-ish - mulle nii võimatuks mängida.
"Kas sa sured kolmel korral, Mario? Siin on kuldne ülisoojustus, sest sa oled sitaks kehv! Kui sa ei taha seda, siis väldi ettevaatlikult igasugust nupule vajutamist peale "alusta taset jah uuesti ei ei mitte midagi muud lihtsalt alusta taset".
Just sellepärast ma lõpetasin Phantom Pain'i mängimise proovimise. Iga kord, kui ma surin, pakkus see mulle kanahat ja ettevaatlikult valis "jah", lõpuks unustasin ma käsitsi öelda "mine nahhui".

Ma saan aru, et see on säilitamise teema, aga see on nii väärikas.
Automaatne raskuse kohandamine ajab mind samuti närvi, sest ma valmistan end ette väljakutseks ja siis mäng paanitseb ja alandab selle superkergeks, sest ma olen olnud "võitlev".
Ma suren või midagi, lähen tagasi, et proovida uuesti, aga ei, nüüd on väljakutse kadunud. Sa õnnestusid! Sa panid mängu minema! Ära muretse, need väljakutsed olid kellegi teise jaoks. Kellegi parema jaoks.
Ma ei mäleta, kas ma kunagi lõpetasin mängu, millel oli automaatne raskuse kohandamine.

Ma arvan, et põhierinevus minu ja nende sihtrühma vahel on see, et mulle meeldib välja mõelda, kuidas midagi teha, samas kui nende sihtrühm - vähemalt nende peades - meeldib sõita logi flumeerimise kaudu läbi Disneyworldi atraktsiooni.
Natuke raputamist, natuke vedelikke, aga ära muretse, beebi, issi Walt hoolitseb sinu eest. Sa oled turvaline, sa ei pea isegi liikuma, lihtsalt istu seal ja tee hee, siin on väike splashy-splash.
Kui ma tahtsin seda, läheksin ma istuma kuradi koeraparki ja silitaksin koera.

source_doc:
I just need a minute.
Take your time, ma'am.
This can't be happening.
He just went to get something from the office.
Oh, God.
Emily.
Oh my God.
What's going on here?
instruction: You are a professional Estonian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Estonian (ekk_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Estonian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Estonian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Estonian (ekk_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ma vajan vaid minut.  
Võta rahulikult, proua.  
See ei saa juhtuda.  
Ta läks just midagi kontorist tooma.  
Oh, Jumal.  
Emily.  
Oh mu Jumal.  
Mis siin toimub?
hypo_1:
Mul on vaja vaid minutit.  
Võta oma aega, proua.  
See ei saa juhtuda.  
Ta läks just kontorist midagi tooma.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

@rechelon äärmiselt ebapopulaarne on üks viis selle sõnastamiseks... ma ei ela Berliinis, aga arvan, et igal pool on inimestel olnud enam-vähem sama vastus, mis on “kuradi need idioodid, kes teevad midagi, mis jätab nii palju mittekaugneme inimesi elektrita ja koheldes seda kui vajalikku kõrvalkahju”. Olen näinud palju inimesi spekuleerimas, et see oli vale lipp, et vasakpoolseid halvas valguses esitleda. Pole, et politsei sellest hooliks, nad on ilmselt nüüd elevil (jube mõelda), et neil on etteanne vasakpoolse stseeni ründamiseks ja kriminaalseteks muutmiseks.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Jah, ma mõtlen, et tundub, et seal on ikka umbes poole tosin anticivi, kes on šokeeritud, et stseen ei toetanud neid, aga on äärmiselt šokeeritud, et vanad anticivid, kes tundsid end antud seltskonna poolt ebamugavalt, ei ole neid toetanud.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Ma muretsen, et näeme eneseõigustamise spiraali, kus käputäis anticive saab nii vihaseks liikumise peale, et nad ei toeta nende super'avatud rünnakut tsiviliseerituse vastu, et nad satuvad ITS tasemel jamadesse aastaga või kahega isolatsioonis ja kihutades.

Olen näinud, et paljud arvavad, et see oli vale lipp, et vasakpoolsed halvasti välja näeks. Politseile sellest ei hooli, nad on ilmselt praegu elevil (vastik on sellist ette kujutada), et neil on ettekääne, et sissetungida ja kriminaliseerida vasakpoolset stseeni.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Jah, tundub, et seal on ikka veel umbes kuus anticivi, kes jagavad meemikontosid ja on šokeeritud, et stseen ei seisa nende kõrval, kuid on äärmiselt üllatunud, et vanad anticivid, kes tundsid end selle meeskonna tõttu alandatuna, ei toeta neid.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Muretsen, et me võime näha eneseõigustamise spiraali, kus mõned anticivid saavad nii vihaseks liikumise peale, et nad ei toeta nende üliväga lahedat rünnakut tsiviliseeritud vastu ja satuvad kahe aasta jooksul isolatsioonis ning kähisevates jamades ITS tasemele.

Frightening?
Well, he just sits there and grins at me.
I told him he didn't see people without an appointment.
He said, oh, he'll see me.
Just tell him it's an old friend.
Clint, do you know anybody by that name?
Clint.
Clint.
No, it doesn't ring a bell.
All right, send him in.
I'll get rid of him.
Okay.
Don't say I didn't warn you.
Mr. Powell will see you.

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.
instruction: You are a professional Estonian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Estonian (ekk_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Estonian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Estonian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Estonian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Estonian (ekk_Latn):
hypo_0:
Minu vend He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, mida sa kirjeldad, on _misogüünia_ tagajärg, mitte "meesvihkamine."

Ma olen hädasti vaja, et mehed mõistaksid, et see, et see on suunatud neile ja on tegelikult tõsine probleem, ei tähenda, et see on "meesvihkamine."
Just nägin kedagi, kes kirjeldas, et teda diskrimineeritakse _naiselt nägemise pärast_, kui "meesvihkamine" ja ma lihtsalt.

Ei ole nii, et sa ei kogeks midagi tõelist. Võib-olla sa tõesti koged. Aga see ei ole "meesvihkamine." Sest "meesvihkamine" ei eksisteeri.
Jah, see kehtib ka transmeeste kohta. "Transmeesvihkamine" _ka_ ei ole asi ja aitab vaid kaasa anti-feministlikele narratiividele. See käsitleb end kui transmisogüünia peegeldust, kuid transmisogüünia on _intersektsionaalne_: me kogeme transfoobiat _ja_ me kogeme misogüüniat _ja_ me kogeme seda püha asja, mis juhtub, kui need kaks on koos. See ei ole alamkogum, isegi mitte eksklusiivne alamkogum, see on intersektsioon.
Aga järgnevad kõik on absoluutne probleem, millest saab rääkida!
* Transfoobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmaskulaarsus
* Transemaskeering
* Misogüünia
On kohutav, et sind diskrimineeritakse, kuid keelekasutus, mida me kasutame, on siin nii, nii oluline.

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

Hello.
Hello.
Nice to meet you.
Welcome to Britain's Got Talent.
Thank you, thank you.
What is your name and where are you from?
My name is Shaney.
I'm from England, but I now live in America.
Okay.
I was here on this stage 70 years ago.
Really?

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

hypo_0:
Ma ootasin, et armastan Project Hail Mary, ma ARMASTASIN Project Hail Mary, see purustas mind ka eriti ainulaadselt teaduse õpetaja naise pärast, kes on aasta jooksul näinud, kuidas kogu teaduse õpetamine on pidevalt rünnatud ja rahastust kärbitud. Inimesed armastavad seda filmi, mis ma olen kindel, et saab olema edukas, ja nad vihkavad mu naise tööd, hävitavad tema programmid ja tahavad, et me kaotaksime oma karjäärid. Kuidas on kõik see korraga võimalik.

Ta lahkus kell 7 hommikul, et minna õpetama praktilisi laboratoorseid töid, kus nad käsitlevad rakke, kus on suurendatud klasside suurusi ja vähendatud õpilasabi, veedab ta laborite keldrites rohkem kontakti tunde üliõpilastega kui üheski teises klassis ülikoolis. Ta lõi programmi kogukonna kolledži üleviimise üliõpilastele, et saada rahastatud töid laborites, avades STEM-teed neile, kellel poleks kunagi olnud võimalust. Kogu tema ülemäärase panuse eest on teda demoniseeritud kui "teeb DEI'd teaduses", mida nad nimetavad ebaseaduslikuks.

Aga sa tead, ma arvan, et kui ta oleks valge mees tarkvarainsener, kes kirjutab fännikuulutusi teaduse õpetamisest.... oleks tal ohutu.

@grimalkina need samad juured on juba Hail Marys, ausalt öeldes. “Ma olen uudishimu täis,” ütlen Strattile. “Kord Hail Mary startib, mida siis teed?”
“Mina?” ütles ta. “Ei ole vahet. Kui Hail Mary käivitatakse, lõpeb mu autoriteet. Ma tõenäoliselt teenin kohtuprotsessi mitme vihase valitsuse poolt võimu kuritarvitamise pärast. Võin veeta oma elu ülejäänud osa vangis.”
“Ma olen sinu kõrval oleval vangikongil,” ütles Leclerc.
“Kas see tekitab sul üldse muret?”
Ta õlgastas. “Me peame kõik tegemiseks ohverdama. Kui ma pean olema maailma karistuspoiss, et tagada meie pääsemine, siis see on minu ohverdus.”

Inimesed armastavad seda filmi, mis kindlalt saab olema hitt, ja nad vihkavad mu naise tööd, hävitavad tema programmid ja tahavad meid karjäärist ilma jätta. Kuidas on see kõik korraga võimalik?

Mulle meeldib Andy Weir väga ja ma ei usu, et ta seda tõsiselt mõtles, kuid kogu see "bürokraatia ja koostöö on tõeliselt takistuseks asjade tegemisel, ja kui jams juhtub, siis tuleb välja võimas antibürokraat, kes loobub diplomaatilisusest ja sundimisega ajab kõiki projekti tegema, hülgates eetika või osalejate soovid" tundus mulle väga Ameerika individuaalsuse ja võimufantaasiana, ja ma ütleks, et Ameerika autor on selle kirjutanud, kui ma ei teaks paremini.

@jcachada @grimalkina
Mis iganes, raamat sisaldab seda lõiku, mis filmi ei jõudnud.
---
“Olen uudishimu täis,” ütlen Strattile. “Kui Hail Mary stardib, mida siis teed?”
“Mina?” ütles ta. “Ei ole vahet. Kui Hail Mary stardib, lõpeb mu autoriteet. Tõenäoliselt olen ma kohtus mitme vihase valitsuse poolt võimu kuritarvitamise pärast. Võin veeta oma ülejäänud elu vangis.”
“Ma olen sinu kõrval olevas kongis,” ütles Leclerc.
“Kas see tekitab sul muret?”
Ta õlgutas. “Me kõik peame ohverdama. Kui pean olema maailma karistuspoiss, et tagada meie pääsemine, siis on see minu ohverdus.”
---
Kas ta on parem või halvem, kui ta arvab, et ohverdab end?

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

Kunagi pole suutnud ühte leida. Kas keegi oskab sellise teha?

Võimendi teenindusjuhend on selge ja arusaadav (pilt 2 ülaltoodud postituses), aga CD-mängijale ei leia ma midagi nii head. Olen lisanud pildi (pilt 4 ülaltoodud postituses) teenindusjuhendist, millest ma *arvan*, et see on asjakohane osa.

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Estonian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Estonian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Estonian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Estonian (ekk_Latn):
hypo_0:
Täna õhtul #MMRPG-s! Mu selg on lõpuks piisavalt vaikne, et ma saaksin taas GM-ina edasi minna, samal ajal kui kangelased otsivad kadunud tüdrukut Cammiet. Vega, Digitaalne Draakon, üllatab kolme kavalate kärbseid, kes on öösel tema mängutakojasse hiilinud, kuid üks neist tunneb ta ära kui linna superkangelast ja nad saavad südantsoojendava hetke, arutledes videomängude üle. Kahjuks katkestab hetke keegi või miski, mis maandub mängutakoja katusele... 1/?

Vega läheb uurima ja leiab Dr. Vesperi, oma koletu nahkhiirekujulises vormis, mida ajakirjandus on kutsunud "Gargoyle Meheks," koos harpiaaluse olendiga, keda Vesper nimetab oma "väikeseks kaitseväeks." Vesper ütleb, et nad on tulnud end tutvustama ja kutsuma Vega liituma nende inimese-loomade eestkostjate seltskonnaga, mida juhib "Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton Laughtoni Instituudist. 2/?

Vega venitab aega, et kavalad kärbsed mängutakojast välja saada ja kutsuda ülejäänud Mytikud appi, siis teeb endale huvitavaks liitumisega selle "uue perekonnaga." Vesper ja Harpy (kes ei räägi kordagi interaktsiooni ajal) juhatavad Vega sadamas olevasse õhulaeva, kus näib, et Laughtoni Instituut pakib oma asju... ilmselt sest nad teavad, et nad köidavad tähelepanu Agent Carterilt ja A.R.G.E.N.T.-ilt ning teistelt. 3/?

Täna õhtul #MMRPG-s! Mu selg on lõpuks nii rahulik, et saan taas GM-ina tegutseda, samas kui kangelased jätkavad kadunud tüdruku Cammie otsimist. Vega, Digitaalne Draakon, üllatab öö keskel kolme kavalat tirtsu, kes on hiilinud tema mängutakoja sisse, kuid üks neist tunneb ta ära linna superkangelasena ja nad jagavad südantsoojendavat hetke, rääkides videomängudest. Kahjuks katkestab hetke keegi või miski, mis maandub mängutakoja katusele... 1/?

Vega läheb uurima ja leiab Dr. Vesperi oma koletu nahkhiirekujulises vormis, mille press on kutsunud "Gargoyle Meheks," koos harpy-taolise olendiga, keda Vesper nimetab oma "väikeseks protegee'ks." Vesper ütleb, et nad on tulnud end tutvustama ja kutsub Vegat liituma nende inimese-loomade ekslike seltskonnaga, mida juhib "Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton Laughtoni Instituudist. 2/?

Vega venitab aega, et kavalad tirtsud mängutakojast välja saada ja kutsub ülejäänud Mytikud appi, siis teeb näo, et on huvitunud liitumisest selle "uue perekonnaga." Vesper ja Harpy (kes ei räägi kordagi kogu interaktsiooni jooksul) juhatavad Vega sadamas asuvale laevule, kus tundub, et Laughtoni Instituut pakib oma asju... ilmselt seepärast, et nad teavad, et köidavad tähelepanu Agent Carterilt ja A.R.G.E.N.T.-ilt ning teistelt. 3/?

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

hypo_0:
@afewbugs Olen seda ka näinud, mul on tõesti mure, et uued liikmed ei pruugi nüüd reaalses maailmas selliseid gruppe leida, kuna nad ei viibi tõenäoliselt vanamoodsatel sotsiaalmeedia platvormidel. Näiteks prooviti anda ära kaks parandamist vajavat jalgratast, kuid Facebookist ei saanud ühtegi huvi. Mõni aasta tagasi ei oleks need kümme minutitki vastu pidanud, enne kui keegi neid endale oleks nõudnud. Mul on üks ja mul on väga halb, et ma ei saanud teist võtta. Samamoodi on prügi korjamine ja kogukonna aiad.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs Mul on praegu Facebooki turul asjade müümisega rohkem vedanud kui Gumtree'is, ja ma ei suuda eBaysse minna kui asjad on liiga suured, et postitada. Võib-olla sõltub see palju ka sellest, kus sa oled, eriti jalgrataste osas!

@lnr @hicksy2 Turg hoiab mind samuti Facebookis. Varem arvasin, et olen seal sõpradega ühenduses, aga ma näen oma tegelikelt sõpradelt peaaegu mitte mingeid postitusi, nii et nüüd on see peamiselt turg, kohalikud grupid ja tõsiasi, et enamikel kohalikel ettevõtetel ja isegi raamatukogul näivad olema ainult oma avamisaeg, erilised üritused jne Facebookis.

Oh!
I am shot!
Oh, absolutely shot.
I am so glad to be home.
Oh, hey.
Hello, Harry.
Blanche almost gave me a heart attack.
What are you doing here?
How did you get in?
I used the key you gave us for emergencies.
This is not an emergency.
Oh, yes it is.
Harry.

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

Well, aren't you even going to look at me?
Sure.
You're too young to know anything about children.
I'm sure the agency said you were 25.
You're not 25, are you?
You're nothing like 25.
Have you ever had a job as a governess before?
No.
But have you ever had any kind of a job?
Yes, I have.
But don't you ever finish a sentence.
Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

hypo_0:
projekt kolimine välja, kevadine vaheaja vahetus
päev 1:
Selgitasin välja peamise magamistoa garderoobi
& kasti sisu ühel seinal.
Ma vaatan üle kõik oma asjad. Tõmban välja väikese protsendi, et säästa. Emotsionaalsed esemed. Praktilised tükid uue elu loomiseks. Praegu tean, et valin rohkem, kui mul vaja on, tõenäoliselt rohkem, kui ma jaksan kanda; kuid see, mida jätsin seljataha, on palju suurem. Otsustan, mida hoida & kuhu, tuleb pärast ülevaatust. Kõik muu antakse "röövlitele."
#moverR

Päev 2, keskpäeva paus, esmaspäev.
Täna on raskem kui eile. Leian palju rohkem "emotsionaalset" kraami. Väljakutse: need päästetud mälestused on füüsiliselt koormavad, mis pigem takistab kui aitab mu tulevikku JA ma tunnen end nende vaatamisega seotud. Tunnen tugevat üldist hukka mõistmist, et hoida emotsionaalseid esemeid. Ent ma tean, et need on võimsad. Aga hei, ma olen kunstnik. Isegi igavad, kurvad mälestused on minu jaoks väärtuslikud. Jätkan nagu varem, hoides vähem+

+kui viskan ära, samas teades, et hoian "liialt palju." Järgmine etapp on tegelik kolimine & ladustamine, kui võib veel midagi ära visata. See etapp on eelvalik enne, kui antud esemed teistele, kes kõik ära viivad.
Faili alla: kuidas kolida välja 12 aastat kodust & kodulinnast 45 aastaga, kus peretraditsioonid (& esemed) on 150 aastat. Ma lahkun lõpuks, otsides kultuuri, mis sobib minu väärtustega.
#moverR

Sellel etapil tean, et valin rohkem, kui mul tegelikult vaja on, tõenäoliselt rohkem, kui ma jaksan kanda; kuid see, mis jääb järgi, on palju suurem. Faili alla: kuidas kolida välja 12 aastat kodust & kodulinnast 45 aastaga, kus peretraditsioonid (& esemed) on 150 aastat. Ma lahkun lõpuks, otsides kultuuri, mis sobib minu väärtustega.
#moverR

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Please translate the following text into Estonian (ekk_Latn):
hypo_0:
Kohalik stabiil Coffs Harbouris nelja kandidaadiga kasumit teenimas

Kohalik treener Noel Mayfield-Smith loodab pühapäeval Coffs Harbouri koosolekul saavutada kasumlik päev, kui stabiilist astuvad välja neli jooksjat kuue võidujooksu kaardil.

Grupi 1 võitnud hobuste treener alustab oma päeva päeva teises sündmuses, kui Ausbred Yahoo osaleb Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap'is (1605m), mille sõidab kahe kilogrammi taotlev praktikant Ella Drew.

Võidusõit naaseb pühapäeval Coffs Harbouri.

Ausbred Yahoo on olnud heas vormis, olles kolm jooksu tagasi saanud Kempsey’s kolmanda koha, millele on järgnenud kaks järjestikust teist kohta Coffs Harbouris, viimane neist pühapäeva vastase Caledonian'i poolt alistatud.

Mayfield-Smith koostööd teeb teise praktikandi, kolme kilogrammi taotlejaga Leanne Boydiga, kui Never Island osaleb Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap'is (1305m).

Kolme oma 15 stardist võiduga, kandis Never Island 59.5 kilogrammi pärast Boyd'i allahindlust. Never Island alistati vähem kui pikkuse võrra, olles Graftonis Montgomery järel teine, ja toetas seda viimase stardiga Coffs Harbouris, olles In The Fine Print'i järel viies, jälle alistatud vähem kui pikkuse võrra.

Raymond Spokes sõidab Mayfield-Smithi ettevalmistatud Monte Cruise'il O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap'is (1205m).

Monte Cruise on samuti kolme korda võitnud vaid üheksa stardiga. Ta pole võistelnud alates juulist, kui lõpetas Eagle Farmis kaheksast viimase, ja on sellel rajal teinud kaks proovivalikut oma naasmise ettevalmistamiseks, lõpetades laupäeva Wyongi võitja Petticoat'i taga teisel kohal, enne kui tõitis viimase neist.

Mayfield-Smith lõpetab päeva, kui ta taas Boydiga koostööd teeb, kui Boyd sõidab Cardsharp'i Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap'is (1305m).

Kohalik stabiil valmistub Coffs Harbouris nelja kandidaadiga kasumlikuks päevaks

Kohalik treener Noel Mayfield-Smith loodab pühapäeva Coffs Harbouri üritusel saavutada kasumliku päeva, sest tema stabiilist tuleb välja neli jooksjat kuue võidujooksu koosseisus.

Grupi 1 võiduga hobusekasvataja alustab päeva päeva teises osavõtus, kui Ausbred Yahoo osaleb Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap'is (1605m), millel sõidab kahe kilogrammi taotleva praktikant Ella Drew.

Võidusõit naaseb pühapäeval Coffs Harbouri.

Ausbred Yahoo on olnud heas vormis, saavutades kolm jooksu tagasi Kempsey's kolmanda koha, millele järgnesid kaks järjestikust teist kohta Coffs Harbouris, viimane neist, kus ta kaotas pühapäeva vastasele Caledonian'ile.

Mayfield-Smith teeb koostööd teise praktikandi, kolme kilogrammi taotleva Leanne Boydiga, kui Never Island osaleb Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap'is (1305m).

Oma 15 stardist kolme võidu saavutanud Never Island kannab pärast Boyd'i allahindlust 59,5 kilogrammi. Never Island kaotas Graftonis Montgomery'ile teiseks jäädes vähem kui pikkuse võrra ning toetas seda viimasel stardil Coffs Harbouris, olles In The Fine Print'i taga taas viies, jälle vähem kui pikkuse võrra.

Raymond Spokes juhib Mayfield-Smithi ettevalmistatud Monte Cruise'i O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap'is (1205m).

Monte Cruise on samuti saavutanud kolm võitu üheksast stardist. Ta ei ole võistelnud alates juulist, kui lõpetas kaheksast viimase Eagle Farmis, ning on teinud kaks testimist sellel rajal oma naasmise ettevalmistamiseks, lõpetades teisel kohal laupäeva Wyongi võitja Petticoat'i taga ning võites viimase neist.

Mayfield-Smith lõpetab päeva, kui ta taas teeb koostööd Boydiga, kes sõidab Cardsharp'i Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap'is (1305m).

And basically, if you go inside of the trumpets or like underneath them, you can hear music.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.
instruction: You are a professional Estonian translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Estonian (ekk_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Estonian grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Estonian. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Estonian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Estonian (ekk_Latn):
hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social nii, me nüüd märgime kinnitatud inimeste sisu, et neil oleks vähem segadust treenimiseks?
Ma ei tea, nad peaksid lämbuma oma enda välja oksendatud segadusest, mille nad on loonud, kuni nende latentne vektori ruum konvergeerub ühte.

@helpsterTee @hannorein Minu esimene mõte ka. Ma lõpetasin oma isikliku saidi, kuna ei tahtnud toita erinevaid Piina Nexus'e. Tõelise inimliku sisu märkimine teeb uus, mürgitamata ja segavaba andmekogude loomise lihtsamaks.
Ma mõtlesin teha vastupidist ja luua AI roomikutele "mürgipoti", aga mu väike server ei ole nii võimekas.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social jah, kui me kannatame, las nad kannatavad.
Kui teie tööandja paneb AI teie igapäevaellu, siis selle asemel, et lahkuda, kasutage pahatahtlikku vastavust ja rakendage seda täiesti igapäevastele probleemidele ning haarake veidi valevastuseid, samal ajal lõpetades ettevõtte krediiti, et kvartali tulemusi rikkuda.
Ma olen sellest nii tüdinud ja nad kasutavad seda nagunii meie vastu, nii et laseme natuke lõbutseda, kuni saame 🫤
Muuda: nad teevad pidevalt numbreid ja vale kasumit juba mõnda aega, kasutamine, mis muudab teie tööandja pankrotti, ei kahjusta nagunii segase peakorteriga kahjumlikku skeemiettevõtet või nende metsa põletavat slopetuumat.

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.

Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Estonian translation, without any additional explanations or commentary.
